question: What tighter chronology or operator-facing evidence can harden the Upper Colorado recovery-to-shortage whiplash variant without collapsing it into the hydrologic branch?

expected_outputs.description: At least one new or updated grounding note

notes: Used the grounding pass to harden the Upper Colorado whiplash variant with a clearer relief-to-constraint chronology and operator-facing runoff-conversion evidence.
